description: CompositionWhite boat neck t-shirt made of 65% polyester and 35% viscose, with graphic on the chest, dolman sleeves and belt Wash care1. Wash dark colours separately2. Use mild detergent in warm water (maximum 40 degrees)3. Do not wring or bleach4. Flat dry in shade5. Do not iron on printFittingRegular FitGet ready to party in this hot tee from jealous 21. The belted waist, dolman sleeves and swirly graphic print all add to the eye appeal of the top, while the slinky fabric skims your curves for a great look. Team this with skinny jeans, black heels and loads of silver bangles for a great party look.Model's statistics1. The model wears size M in t-shirts2. Height-5.8", Chest-33"
